metadata.cycle: morning cycle (10:00 MYT) — Campaign Day 7, Campaign Period Phase 3
metadata.sentiment_convention: SIGNED -1.0 to +1.0. Negative < -0.20; Neutral -0.20 to +0.20; Positive > +0.20.
metadata.critical_threshold: Sharp shift >30% for PIR-06; Bersatu sharp-negative = [CRITICAL]; PIR-16 [CRITICAL] if hard-news corroborates 'Bersatu exit imminent?' OR 'sasar bentuk kerajaan' OR viral >50%; PIR-07 seat incumbent/leading candidate sentiment drop >20%
metadata.entity_build: SINGLE-LAYER ANALYSIS. Source: entities-20260724-0829.json (morning extraction, 08:29 MYT, 76 entities from 16 NS-relevant articles). All 76 entities analyzed. 50 new entities; 26 existing entities updated. 61 carry-forward entities from rev29. Total tracked: 137. 39th consecutive cycle without critical-threshold crossing.
metadata.source_outlets: FMT, Harian Metro, Utusan, Kosmo, Malay Mail, Astro Awani, Sinar Harian, The Rakyat Post, UMNO Online, BHarian
metadata.cycle_assessment: MORNING-EXTRACTION CYCLE — Morning collection (06:00 MYT 24 Jul) delivered 16 files: 14 full-content articles + 1 headlines summary (7 entries) + 1 index. All NS-relevant; 0 skipped. Dominant theme: MANIFESTO WEEK — highest-level BN-PN cooperation confirmation (merged manifesto into ONE document + cross-voting directive), Bersatu EXCLUDED. 76 entities analyzed. Key developments: (1) BN-PN MERGED MANIFESTO [PIR-06 CRITICAL escalation] — Annuar Musa confirms one document, cross-voting formalized, Bersatu excluded; resolves prior 'sokong BN' tension; (2) Vodus survey (437 voters, 9-21 Jul) — PH 17/BN 15/PN 2, hung assembly possible, BN trust 45% vs PH 19%, Aminuddin favourability 31.7% vs Johor MB 58.1%, 30% movable; (3) Sikamat N.13 full 3-cornered confirmed — Nor Azman (PH) vs Razali (PN/Wawasan) vs Tun Faisal (Bersatu), 34,103 voters; (4) PH counter-narratives — 'perpaduan ummah as threat' (Khalid Samad), 'bukan lagi negeri laluan' economic corridor (Aminuddin), anti-retorik; (5) Internal UMNO dissent — Youth exco cautions 'belum sesuai'; (6) Wawasan 4 seats + bridge positioning; (7) BN manifesto 'Sambung Yang Tergendala' launched TODAY 24 Jul. PIR-06 [CRITICAL] threshold STILL CLEAR — NO Bersatu Tier-4 withdrawal. The 1 critical-priority extraction entity is the merged-manifesto operational escalation (consequence-monitoring milestone), NOT a withdrawal event. Key sentiment dynamics: BN-PN cooperation confidence surges (merged manifesto + cross-voting + shared machinery), Bersatu isolation formalizes (excluded + solo + pending), 'sokong BN' fracture RESOLVED for BN-PN, PH confidence axis holds (confirmed MB + economic vision) but Vodus exposes perception vulnerability (trust 19% + favourability 31.7%).

extraction_analysis.assessment: MORNING-EXTRACTION CYCLE — Morning collection (06:00 MYT 24 Jul) delivered 16 files (14 full-content + 1 headlines-7 + 1 index). All 15 NS-relevant. 76 entities extracted (26 persons, 10 parties, 13 seats, 27 narratives). Largest batch of campaign period — manifesto-week coverage. PIR-06 [CRITICAL] threshold STILL CLEAR — no Bersatu Tier-4 withdrawal (39th cycle).

new_entities.rationale: NEW. Tan Sri, Ketua Penerangan PN. Architect of BN-PN MERGED manifesto: 'kami hanya akan ada satu manifesto.' Cross-voting directive formalized. Reframes power as virtuous. Accompanied PN candidates at nomination. Key PIR-06 cooperation-escalation figure. Positive — drives highest-level cooperation confirmation. [PRIORITY] — central to merged-manifesto milestone.

NEW as person (Rantau tracked separately prior). Datuk Seri (Tok Mat), Timbalan Pengerusi BN & Pengarah PRN BN NS. Launches BN manifesto 'Sambung Yang Tergendala' TODAY (24 Jul). DEFERS MB: 'Let we pass the post first.' Denies Sabah plagiarism: 'perang psikologi.' Campaigns at Chembong. Strong campaign position; MB deferral tempers. [PRIORITY] — BN campaign director + manifesto launch.

NEW. Vodus Research founder. Survey (437 voters, 9-21 Jul): 'very close contest', hung assembly 'cannot be ruled out.' PH 17/BN 15/PN 2. Neutral analytical voice — pollster, not partisan. [none] — data source, neutral posture.

NEW. Calon PH DUN Sikamat (N.13). Ketua Penerangan PKR. Continues Tok Min legacy. 18-year Sikamat resident. 3 foci: kebajikan, pembangunan belia, infrastruktur. Positive — continuity narrative, PH incumbent legacy. [PRIORITY] — key T1 candidate, most-watched seat.

NEW. Calon PN/Wawasan DUN Sikamat. Former Melaka police deputy chief. 3-cornered fight. Neutral-positive — credible profile but PN headwind (2 projected seats). [PRIORITY] — T1 candidate in 3-cornered fight.

NEW. Bersatu Information Chief. Calon Bersatu DUN Sikamat. 3-cornered fight. High-profile. Slightly positive profile but Bersatu exclusion + solo headwind. [PRIORITY] — T1 candidate, Bersatu headwind.

NEW. Calon BN & penyandang DUN Chembong. Campaign trail with Mohamad Hasan. 'Gerak kerja jentera tersusun, respons rakyat amat baik.' Positive — incumbent with strong ground response. [PRIORITY] — BN incumbent, active campaign.

NEW. Naib Presiden PAS. PN launches 'lampiran manifesto' to complement BN: 'manifesto kita lebih kurang sama dengan BN.' Deep PN-BN policy coordination. Positive — bridges PN-BN policy gap. [PRIORITY] — PN-BN coordination figure.

NEW. Pengerusa BN Kedah. Cross-state BN-PN machinery: 'penyatuan bangsa dan bukan mengenepikan kaum lain.' BN-UMNO 50+ year record. Positive — inclusive framing, cross-state support. [PRIORITY] — BN-PN inclusive-narrative driver.
NEW. Ketua UMNO Bahagian Seremban. Present at Markas PAS Seremban PN lampiran event. Mildly positive — cross-party presence. [none] — routine presence.
NEW. Bekas ADUN Ampangan. Present at PN lampiran event (Markas PAS Seremban). Links Ampangan (N.14, T1) to PN campaign. [PRIORITY] — T1 seat PN activity signal.

NEW. Pengarah Komunikasi Amanah. Leads PH counter to 'perpaduan ummah': 'Rakyat dikotak-katikkan mengikut kaum = masalah.' Frames BN-PN unity as threat to multiracial harmony. Positive — active PH counter-narrative leader. [PRIORITY] — key PIR-16 narrative driver.
NEW. DAP-linked. Present at PH 'perpaduan ummah' press conference. Mildly positive — PH component representation. [none] — routine presence.

NEW. Exco Pemuda UMNO. INTERNAL DISSENT: BN-PN formalization 'belum sesuai.' 'Sokongannya masih samar-samar.' 'Jangan terlebih sudu daripada kuah.' Top-down vs grassroots friction. Negative — fracture signal within BN. [PRIORITY] — grassroots dissent vs merged-manifesto confirmation.

NEW. Vice-President Wawasan. 4 seats (Klawang, Sikamat, Mambau, Gemas). 'Bridge between Malay and non-Malay forces.' Goes up against parent party Bersatu. Positive — bridge positioning, new alignment. [PRIORITY] — Wawasan 4-seat footprint, Bersatu splinter dynamic.
NEW. MB Johor. 58.1% favourability benchmark vs Aminuddin's 31.7%. Highlights PH leadership-perception challenge. Mildly positive — benchmark figure. [none] — comparison reference.
NEW. Linggi voter (37, trader). Cost-of-living pain: rising supply costs, angry customers. Negative voter voice at Aminuddin's new constituency. [none] — voter voice.
NEW. Paroi first-time voter (22, student). Demands employment + wages matching qualifications. Slightly negative — unmet youth expectations. [none] — voter voice.
NEW. Retired teacher (64). Candidate accessibility: 'outsider OK if likeable.' Neutral — pragmatic voter. [none] — voter voice.
NEW. Port Dickson voter (43). Anti-negative-campaigning: 'keep campaign peaceful.' Aligns with PH anti-retorik. [none] — voter voice.
NEW. Housewife (38). Urges rural/estate communities not be left behind. Slightly negative — inclusive-development gap. [none] — voter voice.

NEW. PN component. 4 seats: Klawang, Sikamat, Mambau, Gemas. Bersatu splinter — goes against parent party. 'Bridge between Malay and non-Malay.' Positive — bridge positioning. [PRIORITY] — 4-seat PN footprint, splinter dynamic.
NEW. PH component. Nor Azman = Ketua Penerangan PKR & PH candidate Sikamat. Continuity with Aminuddin legacy. [none] — routine component.
NEW. Independent candidates. 7-point manifesto. Vodus: 2% popular vote. 103 total candidates. Marginal. [none] — peripheral.
NEW. BN incumbent Zaifulbahri. Mohamad Hasan campaign trail at Pedas Tengah. 'Respons rakyat amat baik.' Positive — strong incumbent ground response. [PRIORITY] — BN incumbent, active campaign.

NEW. N.10, T1. Nilai Advanced Photonic AI Manufacturing City (Aminuddin economic corridor). High-tech investment anchor. Positive — flagship economic project. [PRIORITY] — T1 seat, economic vision anchor.
NEW. Wawasan (PN) seat. Part of Wawasan 4-seat footprint. [PRIORITY] — Wawasan seat.
NEW. PN candidate nomination. Annuar Musa accompanying — joint BN-PN machinery demonstration. Positive — cooperation visible at nomination. [PRIORITY] — joint BN-PN nomination.
NEW. PN candidate nomination. Annuar Musa accompanying — joint BN-PN machinery demonstration. Positive — cooperation visible at nomination. [PRIORITY] — joint BN-PN nomination.

NEW [CRITICAL escalation]. Highest-level BN-PN cooperation: manifestos merged into ONE document. Cross-voting directive formalized. Seat formula BN 25 + PN 11 = 36. Bersatu EXCLUDED. Resolves prior 'sokong BN' tension. 3-outlet corroboration (FMT + Harian Metro + Utusan). Consequence-monitoring milestone — NOT a withdrawal event. Strong positive for BN-PN cooperation. [CRITICAL] — dominant PIR-06 development.

NEW. Both coalitions direct supporters to vote each other's candidates on 1 Aug. Formalized at coalition level. Contrasts prior Muhyiddin distance ('saya tidak terlibat') — now EMBRACED by both. Positive — fracture healed for BN-PN. [PRIORITY] — cross-voting formalized, resolves prior tension.

NEW. PN publishes supplementary manifesto to fill BN manifesto gaps. Idris Ahmad (PAS VP): 'manifesto kita lebih kurang sama dengan BN.' Deep policy coordination. Positive — PN-BN policy alignment. [PRIORITY] — deep coordination signal.

new_entities.entity: Internal UMNO dissent vs BN-PN formalization
new_entities.rationale: NEW. Grassroots friction. Saifullah (UMNO Youth exco): 'sokongannya masih samar-samar.' 'Jangan terlebih sudu daripada kuah.' 'Gelombang hari ini adalah gelombang BN.' Top-down vs grassroots. Negative — fracture within BN. [PRIORITY] — grassroots dissent signal.

new_entities.entity: 'Bukan lagi negeri laluan' — economic corridor vision
new_entities.rationale: NEW. Aminuddin major economic narrative: NS as 'pusat perjalanan' not transit. 4-wilayah ecosystem. 6 strategic projects: MVV 2.0, Semiconductor Valley, Nilai AI City, Seremban Sentral, Hospital Enstek, logistics. Positive — forward-looking economic vision. [PRIORITY] — flagship PH economic narrative.

NEW. PH narrative pairing: Anwar (federal PM) + Aminuddin (state MB) deliver aligned development. 'Confirmed MB + record' confidence axis. Positive — federal-state alignment. [PRIORITY] — PH confidence-axis narrative.

new_entities.entity: 'Perpaduan ummah' — PH counter (threat to multiracial harmony)
new_entities.rationale: NEW. PH counter-narrative: BN-PN 'perpaduan ummah' framed as divisive. Khalid Samad: 'Rakyat dikotak-katikkan mengikut kaum = masalah.' Full PH component representation. Positive for PH — active counter-narrative. [PRIORITY] — PIR-16 narrative duel, PH side.

new_entities.entity: 'Perpaduan ummah / penyatuan bangsa' — BN-PN inclusive framing
new_entities.rationale: NEW. BN-PN counter to PH: 'penyatuan bangsa' as inclusive Malay-Muslim unity. Mahdzir: 'bukan mengenepikan kaum lain.' BN-UMNO 50+ year record. Positive for BN-PN — inclusive framing. [PRIORITY] — PIR-16 narrative duel, BN-PN side.

NEW. Annuar Musa reframes power-seeking as virtuous: 'Kita perlukan kuasa untuk laksanakan kebaikan untuk agama.' Responds to Khalid Samad's critique. Mildly positive — defensive reframe. [PRIORITY] — opposition narrative asset.

new_entities.entity: Vodus seat projection: hung assembly possible
new_entities.rationale: NEW. PH 17/BN 15/PN 2/2 undecided. Neither reaches 19. PH leads 8 of 10 close seats. Bersatu splitter in 7 of 10. 'Dewan tergantung tidak boleh ditolak.' Neutral-slightly-negative — instability signal. [PRIORITY] — quantitative baseline, hung-assembly risk.

NEW. 19 seats needed; both PH and BN below. Three factors: BN Malay retention, PH Chinese+turnout, battleground management. 'Boleh pergi ke mana-mana arah.' Neutral-slightly-negative — uncertainty. [PRIORITY] — threshold narrative.

NEW. BN net trust 45% vs PH 19% vs PN 5%. Strategic asset despite BN's lower vote share (35% vs PH 42%). 'Kelebihan strategik yang signifikan.' Positive for BN — trust advantage. [PRIORITY] — BN strategic narrative asset.

NEW. Aminuddin favourability 31.7% vs Johor MB Onn Hafiz 58.1%. PH leadership-perception challenge. Translates vote lead into governance-confidence gap. Negative — perception vulnerability. [PRIORITY] — PH perception challenge.

new_entities.entity: Voter volatility: 30% movable / 51% very likely to vote
new_entities.rationale: NEW. 30% voters open to changing choice. Only 51% 'very likely' to vote. High volatility + turnout risk. Negative — turnout uncertainty. [PRIORITY] — turnout risk for both sides.

new_entities.entity: Voters want 'leaders who can get things done'
new_entities.rationale: NEW. Bernama survey: competence over rhetoric. Top concerns: cost of living (55%), jobs (34%), housing (26%), corruption (24%). Aligns with PH anti-retorik. Positive for PH — competence framing. [PRIORITY] — voter-priority narrative.

new_entities.entity: Mohamad Hasan MB deferral ('Let we pass the post first')
new_entities.rationale: NEW. BN defers MB: 'Jangan terlampau cakap pasal poster boy, tapi tak buat kerja. Let we pass the post first.' Contrasts PH's confirmed Aminuddin. Negative — confidence gap. [PRIORITY] — BN MB vulnerability.
NEW. 22,339 police & military personnel + spouses vote early 28 Jul. Significant early-voting bloc. Polling 1 Aug. Neutral — procedural. [PRIORITY] — early-voting bloc, campaign-intensity factor.

NEW. Wawasan positions as bridge uniting Malay and non-Malay forces within PN. Bersatu splinter vs parent party. 'New political alignment.' Positive — bridge positioning. [PRIORITY] — PN component narrative.
NEW. 'Tak perlu debat, ini bukan pemilihan presiden.' Rejecting debate format. Headline-only. Slightly negative — avoids scrutiny. [none] — headline-only.

new_entities.entity: 200 KDNKA officers deployed for PRN NS
new_entities.rationale: NEW. ~200 KDNKA officers deployed for election security. Headline-only. Neutral — procedural. [none] — headline-only.
NEW. Deputy PM Zahid responds to PM Anwar with pantun, defending Kerajaan Perpaduan. Headline-only. Mildly positive — solidarity display. [none] — headline-only.

updated_entities.rationale: Datuk Seri (Tok Min), NS MB & PH MB candidate (Linggi). Launches 'Kekal Harapan' manifesto. Economic corridor vision 'bukan lagi negeri laluan.' Anti-retorik directive. BUT Vodus favourability 31.7% (vs Johor MB 58.1%) drags. +0.52→+0.50 stable — confirmed-MB positives offset by newly-exposed low-favourability signal. [PRIORITY] — confirmed MB + economic vision, but perception gap.

Bersatu President. Bersatu EXCLUDED from BN-PN merged manifesto. Manifesto STILL pending (Radzi Jidin). MB undecided. First time under own name (24 seats solo). Underdog framing. -0.95→-0.95 (0%) — at floor; formal exclusion from merged manifesto is structural deepening but NOT a fresh sharp-negative shift. [CRITICAL] — pre-existing sharp-negative; exclusion deepens isolation.

Timbalan Presiden Bersatu. Chairs manifesto committee. Manifesto STILL pending — now behind BOTH PH (21 Jul) AND BN (24 Jul). Focus: ekonomi, infrastruktur, kesihatan, pendidikan. -0.05→-0.15 declining — falling further behind as both competitors launch. [PRIORITY] — Bersatu operational vulnerability deepens.
Menteri Komunikasi. Present at PH press conference countering 'perpaduan ummah.' +0.34→+0.34 stable — routine presence, recast PIR-07→PIR-16. [none] — routine component representation.
Timbalan PM. Pantun exchange with Anwar, defending Kerajaan Perpaduan. 'No Bangkok Move, no Dubai Move.' -0.10→-0.10 stable — headline-only, routine. [none] — headline-only solidarity display.

MERGES manifesto with PN into ONE document. 25 seats. Cross-voting. 'Sambung Yang Tergendala' launch TODAY. MB deferred. Vodus: 15 seats, 35% vote, 45% net trust (advantage). +0.18→+0.25 improving — merged manifesto + trust advantage. [PRIORITY] — highest cooperation + strategic trust asset.

PAS-led. 11 seats. Merged manifesto with BN. Lampiran to complement BN. Cross-voting EMBRACED. Shared stages. Vodus: 2 seats, 7% vote, 5% trust. +0.15→+0.25 improving — cooperation formalized, 'sokong BN' tension RESOLVED. [PRIORITY] — operational cooperation deepens despite weak projection.

Confirmed MB (Aminuddin). 'Kekal Harapan' manifesto, 10 commitments, anti-retorik. 8-year record. Vodus: 17 seats, 42% vote, 19% trust. +0.35→+0.38 improving — confirmed MB + manifesto + seat lead. BUT trust 19% + favourability 31.7% = vulnerability. [PRIORITY] — seat leader but perception gap.

SOLO 24 seats — NOT part of BN-PN merged manifesto. Manifesto STILL pending. MB undecided. First time own name in NS. Vodus: 2 of 24 seats. In 7 of 10 close contests (splitter). -0.95→-0.95 (0%) — at floor; formal exclusion deepens isolation but NOT a fresh sharp-negative shift. [CRITICAL] — pre-existing; excluded from merged manifesto.

PN lead party. VP Idris Ahmad aligns manifesto with BN. Deep PN-BN policy coordination. 'Perubahan politik NS pada 1 Ogos.' +0.15→+0.22 improving — deep coordination via lampiran. [PRIORITY] — PN-BN policy alignment.
PH component. Khalid Samad leads 'perpaduan ummah' counter-narrative. Full component representation. +0.15→+0.20 improving — active counter-narrative. [none] — routine component activity.

PH component. Cha Kee Chin at 'perpaduan ummah' press conference. Increasingly concerned about BN-PN cooperation. -0.18→-0.15 improving — PH countering 'DAP jahat' labeling. [none] — routine component, marginal improvement.

N.13, T1. 3-CORNERED confirmed: Nor Azman (PH) vs Razali (PN/Wawasan) vs Tun Faisal (Bersatu). 34,103 voters; youth 29.4%. Most watched T1. +0.15→+0.20 improving — full field confirmed. [CRITICAL] — most-watched T1 seat, 3-cornered.
Mohamad Hasan's BN seat (penyandang). BN PRN director's base. +0.42→+0.42 stable — stronghold. [PRIORITY] — BN director's base.

N.32, T1. Aminuddin's NEW constituency. PH manifesto launch context. Economic corridor vision. Voter cost-of-living voice. +0.18→+0.20 improving — REVERSES declining trend (was 35.7% cumulative decline flagged). [CRITICAL] — at-risk seat improving; Aminuddin's flagship challenge.
N.25, T1. First-time voter on employment/wages. Active ground. +0.15→+0.18 improving. [PRIORITY] — T1 seat, active ground.
N.14, T1. Former ADUN Abu Ubaidah at PN lampiran event. Links T1 seat to PN campaign. +0.08→+0.10 improving. [PRIORITY] — T1 seat, PN activity.
N.28, T1. Wawasan (PN) seat. Wawasan vs PH contest. +0.15→+0.15 stable. [PRIORITY] — T1 seat, Wawasan contest.
Wawasan (PN) seat. Part of Wawasan 4-seat footprint. +0.15→+0.15 stable. [PRIORITY] — Wawasan seat.
Multiple voter voices (campaign conduct). Nomination centre. +0.20→+0.20 stable. [none] — routine campaign venue.

Shared ceramah stages, jentera, markas. Grand finale joint address 3 days before polling. Simultaneous candidate intros. NOW formalized via merged manifesto. +0.70→+0.75 improving — operational blueprint fully activated. [CRITICAL] — highest cooperation-confidence signal.

updated_entities.entity: Bersatu solo / excluded from merged manifesto
updated_entities.rationale: Bersatu runs INDEPENDENTLY — NOT part of merged manifesto. Manifesto pending. Solo 24 seats. Vodus: 2 of 24. Vote splitter in 7 of 10 close contests. No Tier-4 withdrawal. -0.82→-0.85 declining — formal exclusion deepens. [CRITICAL] — Bersatu isolation formalized.

BN manifesto theme — nostalgia for pre-2018 BN development. Launched TODAY 24 Jul. Denies Sabah plagiarism: 'perang psikologi.' +0.25→+0.20 — launched but backward-looking nostalgia framing + plagiarism accusation tempers. [PRIORITY] — BN manifesto launched, nostalgia contrast with PH forward-vision.

PH manifesto theme. All candidates: manifesto delivery, not rhetoric. 'Realistik dan boleh dilaksanakan.' 8-year track record. Anti-slander directive. +0.38→+0.40 improving — anti-retorik strategy crystallized. [PRIORITY] — PH manifesto, anti-retorik.

Bersatu manifesto in drafting (Radzi Jidin). Focus: ekonomi, infrastruktur, kesihatan, pendidikan. STILL pending — behind PH (21 Jul) AND BN (24 Jul). FADING. -0.20→-0.28 declining — falling further behind. [PRIORITY] — Bersatu vulnerability deepens.

EVOLUTION: Prior cycle Muhyiddin distanced ('saya tidak terlibat', 'agak janggal'). This cycle cross-voting EMBRACED by both BN & PN. Bersatu still excluded. -0.45→-0.15 improving — tension largely RESOLVED into formal cooperation. [PRIORITY] — fracture healed for BN-PN; Bersatu isolated.

carry_forward_entities.entity: 'We have a candidate AND a record'
Anwar first NS campaign tour (Wed 22 Jul)
PIR-06 [CRITICAL] threshold — STILL CLEAR (no Tier-4 withdrawal)

pir_06_critical.assessment: NOT CROSSED (39th cycle). No formal PN-MT expulsion notice. No Bersatu candidate withdrawal (24 solo-logo candidates STABLE). No Kiandee quorum escalation. No 'lebih hebat' formalization. No RoS action. MAJOR this cycle: BN-PN merged manifesto (ONE document + cross-voting directive) = highest-level cooperation confirmation — a consequence-monitoring MILESTONE, NOT a candidate-withdrawal event. The prior cycle's 'sokong BN' directive distance (Muhyiddin disavowal) is now RESOLVED into formal cooperation — cross-voting EMBRACED by both BN & PN. Bersatu remains EXCLUDED (solo 24 seats). Bersatu sharp-negative alert is pre-existing (stable at -0.95 critical); merged-manifesto exclusion is structural deepening, not a fresh sharp-negative shift.
pir_06_critical.sharp_shift_details: No PIR-06 entity shows sharp NEGATIVE shift >30% that signals a structural fracture. Muhyiddin -0.95→-0.95 (0%); Bersatu -0.95→-0.95 (0%); Bersatu-PN fracture -0.92→-0.75 (+18% IMPROVING — BN-PN side healed); Bersatu solo/excluded -0.82→-0.85 (3.7% decline — marginal, not >30%). FLAGGED shifts >30%: (a) Radzi Jidin -0.05→-0.15 (200% in relative terms but 0.10-point absolute decline from near-zero base — Bersatu manifesto falling further behind, marginal not structural); (b) POSITIVE >30% shifts (NOT threshold concerns): PN +0.15→+0.25 (+66% — cooperation formalized); BN +0.18→+0.25 (+39% — merged manifesto + trust advantage); PAS +0.15→+0.22 (+47% — deep PN-BN coordination); 'Sokong BN' distance -0.45→-0.15 (+66% IMPROVING — tension resolved). All >30% shifts are either POSITIVE (cooperation deepening) or marginal in absolute terms, not negative fracture signals.

pir_16_critical.assessment: NOT CROSSED (39th cycle). No hard-news corroboration of 'Bersatu exit imminent?' — merged manifesto EXCLUDES Bersatu but 24 solo candidates STABLE (no withdrawal). No hard-news corroboration of 'sasar bentuk kerjaan' for Bersatu — Bersatu solo is structural, not a fresh 'sasarkan' declaration. Today's dominant PIR-16 themes: (1) MANIFESTO DUEL — BN 'Sambung Yang Tergendala' (nostalgia, launched 24 Jul) vs PH 'Kekal Harapan' (anti-retorik, forward-looking) vs Bersatu pending (FADING); (2) 'PERPADUAN UMMAH' DUEL — BN-PN 'penyatuan bangsa' (inclusive, Mahdzir) vs PH counter (threat to multiracial harmony, Khalid Samad) — intensifying but not yet >50% measurable; (3) VODUS QUANTITATIVE AXIS — trust gap (BN 45% vs PH 19%), favourability gap (Aminuddin 31.7% vs Johor 58.1%), 30% movable voters, 51% turnout intent — NEW data points with strong initial presence; (4) ECONOMIC CORRIDOR VISION — Aminuddin 'bukan lagi negeri laluan', 6 strategic projects — NEW flagship narrative. BN trust-advantage narrative is NEW with 2-outlet corroboration — watch for amplification.
pir_16_critical.viral_amplification_details: No EXISTING narrative shows >50% volume increase. BN-PN merged manifesto (3 outlets: FMT + Harian Metro + Utusan) is NEW with strong initial corroboration but no prior baseline to measure increase. Vodus survey (Malay Mail + Sinar) is NEW. 'Perpaduan ummah' duel is NEW (both framings appear same cycle). BN trust-advantage (2 outlets) is NEW. Economic corridor vision (Awani) is NEW. All are NEW narratives — cannot be measured for >50% increase (no prior baseline). Watch for amplification next cycle, especially merged-manifesto + trust-advantage + perpaduan-ummah duel.

pir_07_critical.assessment: No incumbent/leading candidate sentiment drop >20% detected this cycle. All surfaced T1 seats IMPROVING: DUN Sikamat (N.13) +0.15→+0.20 (improving — 3-cornered confirmed); DUN Linggi (N.32) +0.18→+0.20 (improving — REVERSES 35.7% cumulative decline! manifesto + economic vision); DUN Paroi (N.25) +0.15→+0.18 (improving); DUN Ampangan (N.14) +0.08→+0.10 (improving — PN activity); DUN Klawang (N.28) +0.15 stable; Rantau +0.42 stable. New T1 seats: Nilai (N.10) +0.25 (AI City), Chembong +0.25 (BN incumbent strong), Bagan Pinang +0.30, Lukut +0.30 (joint BN-PN nomination). No defector-framing intensification at N.14. Derhaka at Pertang NOT intensifying — carried at -0.05 improving (BN candidate pledge constructive, no derhaka content this cycle). Aminuddin Sikamat→Linggi swap risk -0.38→-0.32 improving — at-risk trajectory arrested.
pir_07_critical.seat_drop_alert: DUN Linggi (N.32) cumulative decline was 35.7% across prior cycles — NOW REVERSING (+0.18→+0.20 improving). The at-risk trajectory is arrested by PH manifesto launch + economic corridor vision + Aminuddin's new-constituency context. Still flagged [CRITICAL] for monitoring but trend is IMPROVING. No seat shows >20% drop this cycle.

next_cycle_watch: BN manifesto launch 24 Jul (TODAY) — 'Sambung Yang Tergendala' impact; does nostalgia framing amplify or fade vs PH forward-vision? Joint BN-PN or BN-only framing at launch venue?
Bersatu manifesto launch — Radzi Jidin committee; does it offset exclusion vulnerability? Now behind BOTH PH (21 Jul) and BN (24 Jul). Watch for launch timing.

Vodus survey impact propagation — does hung-assembly + trust-gap (BN 45% vs PH 19%) + favourability-gap (31.7% vs 58.1%) framing propagate? Does PH address the perception vulnerability? Does BN leverage trust advantage?

'Perpaduan ummah' duel amplification — BN-PN 'penyatuan bangsa' (inclusive) vs PH 'threat to multiracial harmony' (Khalid Samad). Does either framing gain traction in Malay-majority seats? Watch for >50% amplification.
Internal UMNO dissent escalation — does Saifullah's 'belum sesuai' spread beyond Youth exco or get absorbed by merged-manifesto momentum? Top-down vs grassroots friction trajectory.
